summary: Broad infrastructure role in a growing environment with focus on modernization, ITSM, monitoring and automation.
highlights: Modernization of network, server, database and monitoring systems.
Introduction of Microsoft 365 and endpoint management processes.
Automation of ITSM workflows with Jira Service Management, PowerShell and CI workflows.
Building IPAM and automation foundations with NetBox, REST, Ansible and NAPALM.
